evidence_direction_note: Design-inconclusive: both H and C agents show commit_rate=1.0 in eval (running_variance ~8.7e-7 and ~2.2e-6 respectively, both far below commit_threshold). Mode transition from Phase A to Phase B cannot be detected because the agent never escapes committed mode regardless of hazard level. hysteresis_decay_steps=20 is the minimum (not zero) due to rolling window mechanics, not real hysteresis signal. Does not constitute evidence for or against MECH-047. Fix direction: use pre-convergence checkpoints or forced variance injection to produce the mode transition the experiment is designed to measure.
